title: Holding It Together
subtitle: Group Therapy for Adults Who Are Quietly Struggling With Overwhelm or Disconnection

hero_section.title: You look like you're holding everything together. But inside, it feels heavy.
hero_section.text1: You show up for work, for family, for friends. To the outside world, you look high functioning and capable. People rely on you. You're a master at pushing through.
hero_section.text2: But inside, the emotional load can get overwhelming. The quiet moments are when overwhelm and disconnection hit hardest. Maybe your nervous system is on edge more often than you admit.
hero_section.text3: You’re not broken, and you’re not alone. This group creates room for that — a place where you don’t have to hold everything by yourself.

who_for_section.title: Who this group is for:
points: Adults who appear high functioning but feel overwhelmed or numb inside
People who support everyone else and struggle to receive support themselves
Those experiencing anxiety, depression, burnout, and/or emotional disconnection
Anyone tired of feeling alone in their healing and wanting real connection
who_for_section.footer_italic: This is a trauma-informed, connection-based therapy group that meets in person in Leesburg, Virginia.

weekly_focus.title: Weekly Focus:
weeks: Thoughts, Emotions, and the Inner Critic

footer_cta.title: Ready to put down the weight?
footer_cta.text: Join the interest list to receive group details and next steps.
